top_signals.title: Czechs Mull First Rate Hike Since 2022 to Curb Price Risks
top_signals.summary: The Czech central bank may raise interest rates for the first time in four years as policymakers weigh domestic inflation pressures against receding risks from global energy prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Roy Cooper's North Carolina Senate race could help decide control of the next Congress
top_signals.summary: North Carolina’s 2026 Senate race pits Democrat Roy Cooper against Republican Michael Whatley in a swing state Democrats haven't won since with Obama in 2008.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Intertek to quit FTSE 100 after agreeing £11bn EQT takeover
top_signals.summary: FTSE 100 giant Intertek has agreed to a £10bn takeover by Swedish buyout firm EQT, triggering the latest high-profile departure from the London Stock Exchange. The testing and assurance company said on Thursday that it has agreed to the £60 per share offer, valuing the deal at £10.9bn including debt. The agreement seals a long-running [...]
